name: Norbeck Country Club
about: Norbeck Country Club is a private country club located in Rockville, Maryland, serving as the centerpiece of the local community. It offers a comprehensive array of amenities including a championship golf course, racquet sports, swimming, dining, and a fitness center. The club provides a haven of camaraderie, fun, and relaxation for its members, supported by a dynamic calendar of events. Membership includes access to the Invited Network, offering reciprocity at numerous other clubs, hotels, and entertainment venues nationwide. Current membership promotions include reduced monthly dues and access to a newly renovated, state-of-the-art fitness center.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a championship golf course and extensive practice facilities
Membership in the Invited Network for reciprocal play at hundreds of clubs nationwide
On-site golf coaching and club fitting services for players of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full dining service available with emphasis on quality food and service
Alcohol service is part of the dining experience

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While members can use their own clubs, the club also offers club fitting services and may have rental options available. Contact the club directly for specific equipment policies.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The club has an on-site dining service with quality food and beverage offerings. Outside food and drink policies are not specified, so it's best to inquire directly with the club.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes at Norbeck Country Club is not specified on the website. Contact the club directly for information on pace of play and tee time availability.

faq.question: Is the club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Norbeck Country Club is family-friendly with a variety of events and activities for children, families, and adults. They offer junior golf programs like 'Crush It! Youth Golf Lessons' and family-oriented community events.
